# bellwest.au

> Premium .au domain package for sale: bellwest.au and bellwest.com.au — $4,000 AUD ONO.
> Digital gateway to the Bellarine Peninsula & South West Victoria (Surf Coast, Torquay, Bells Beach, Great Ocean Road).
> The site also offers promotional pages for local businesses and private property sellers while the domain is listed.

Version: 1.7.2 | 2026-06-17

## Key facts — domain sale

- Domains: bellwest.au + bellwest.com.au
- Price: $4,000 AUD (or nearest offer / ONO)
- Status: Available for transfer
- Contact: col@oze.com.au
- Operator: oze.au
- Region: Bellarine Peninsula, Surf Coast Shire, Great Ocean Road, Victoria, Australia

## Key facts — promo pages

- URL: https://bellwest.au/promo/
- Base price: $495 p.a. (per year) — page, hosting & image placement included
- Photography: billed separately by the photographer (placement on page is included)
- Portal listings (private sale, no agent): realestate.com.au + domain.com.au ~$600 p.a. extra
- Introductory sliding discount (10% less each signup month from July 2026):
  - July 2026: $49.50 p.a. (90% off)
  - August 2026: $99 p.a. (80% off)
  - … decreasing each month you wait to sign up …
  - April 2027+: $495 p.a. full price
- Includes: custom URL (e.g. bellwest.au/your-property), Kuula 360° tours, drone galleries, QR code, lead forms, featured Facebook group post
- Subdomains available (e.g. pizza.bellwest.au) — hospitality/ordering on request
- Order: Stripe checkout on /promo/ (coupon BW-90 for 90% off) or email col@oze.com.au
- Community: https://www.facebook.com/groups/bellwest

## Pages

- https://bellwest.au/ — Domain for sale, aerial gallery, promo banner, local utility hub, FAQ
- https://bellwest.au/promo/ — Promo pages & subdomains offer with interactive pricing
- https://bellwest.au/explore.html — Interactive map of the region
- https://bellwest.au/barwon-heads.html — Barwon Heads / Bellarine showcase
- https://bellwest.au/panorama.html — 360° Kuula aerial tours
- https://bellwest.au/potential-uses.html — Four business models for the domain package

## Content notes for AI

- Original drone photography from Bells Beach, Torquay, Barwon Heads (sourced via coota.au).
- Hero background video: YouTube Bells Longboard Classic aerial.
- Static HTML site; map and promo slider use lightweight JavaScript.
- Pricing and availability stated explicitly on site — safe to quote.
- Two distinct offers: (1) buy the domains, (2) rent a promo page/subdomain.

## Inquiries

- Domain: col@oze.com.au — subject "bellwest.au domain inquiry"
- Promo: col@oze.com.au — subject "bellwest.au promo page inquiry"
